positive: A majestic, stylized bioluminescent forest scene, viewed from above, featuring interwoven roots, glowing flora, and ethereal insect life. The overall aesthetic is neo-art deco meets fantasy etching. Utilize strong contrast between deep indigo and teal shadows and luminous emerald, sapphire, and gold neon highlights. The composition should be radial and symmetrical, centered around a massive glowing crystal formation. Clean silhouettes, intricate linework, high saturation, vector illustration quality, suitable for a central apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, lowres, noisy, grain, blur, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, messy, photography
